description: First merkle proof's first path step has its 'sibling' hex hash mutated by flipping the last character.

modifications.rationale: Mutating a path step's sibling causes the walked-root computation to diverge from proof.root, surfacing the forgery at check 4. The file's SHA-256 also changes (check 2).

expected_failures: check 2 (artifact integrity): merkle_proofs.json SHA-256 declared in manifest no longer matches computed.
check 4 (Merkle proof): proofs[0] walked root differs from proofs[0].root and from manifest.daily_root.
